mapper.select:
SELECT E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, P.POS_NM AS posNm,
NVL(EP_CUR.BASE_AMT, GB_CUR.STD_AMT) AS baseAmt, CASE WHEN EP_CUR.EMP_NO IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS baseAmtExists, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EMP_PAY_INFO H WHERE H.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasHistory, TRIM(EP_CUR.BANK_NAME) AS bankName, TRIM(EP_CUR.ACCNT_NO) AS accntNo, CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(EP_CUR.BANK_NAME), '') IS NULL AND NULLIF(TRIM(EP_CUR.ACCNT_NO), '') IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS unregistered
FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON P.POS_CD = E.POS_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT emp_no, base_amt, bank_name, accnt_no FROM ( SELECT emp_no, base_amt, bank_name, accnt_no, start_dtm, end_dtm, pay_seq, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY emp_no ORDER BY start_dtm DESC NULLS LAST, pay_seq DESC ) rn FROM EMP_PAY_INFO WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(start_dtm, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(end_dtm, DATE '9999-12-31')) ) WHERE rn = 1 ) EP_CUR ON EP_CUR.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pos_cd, std_amt FROM ( SELECT pos_cd, std_amt, start_dt, end_dtm, base_amt_no, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY pos_cd ORDER BY start_dt DESC NULLS LAST, base_amt_no DESC ) rn FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(start_dt, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(end_dtm, DATE '9999-12-31')) ) WHERE rn = 1 ) GB_CUR ON GB_CUR.POS_CD = E.POS_CD
ORDER BY CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(EP_CUR.BANK_NAME), '') IS NULL AND NULLIF(TRIM(EP_CUR.ACCNT_NO), '') IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, E.EMP_NM

SELECT E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, P.POS_NM AS posNm, EP_CUR.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, 1 AS baseAmtExists, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EMP_PAY_INFO H WHERE H.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasHistory FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON P.POS_CD = E.POS_CD INNER JOIN ( SELECT emp_no, base_amt FROM ( SELECT emp_no, base_amt, start_dtm, end_dtm, pay_seq, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY emp_no ORDER BY start_dtm DESC NULLS LAST, pay_seq DESC ) rn FROM EMP_PAY_INFO WHERE TRUNC(#{baseDate}) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(start_dtm, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(end_dtm, DATE '9999-12-31')) AND TRUNC(NVL(end_dtm, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) EP_CUR ON EP_CUR.EMP_NO = E.EMP_NO ORDER BY E.EMP_NM
SELECT POS_CD AS posCd, POS_NM AS posNm FROM POSITION_MST WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY POS_NM

SELECT E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, P.POS_CD AS posCd, P.POS_NM AS posNm, E.EMP_EMAIL AS email FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON P.POS_CD = E.POS_CD WHERE E.EMP_NO = #{empNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PAY_SEQ AS paySeq, EMP_NO AS empNo, BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCNT_NO AS accntNo, DEDUCT_FAM_CNT AS deductFamCnt, SALARY_GRADE AS salaryGrade, ADJUST_RSN AS adjustRsn, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM EMP_PAY_INFO WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY START_DTM DESC, PAY_SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT PAY_SEQ AS paySeq, EMP_NO AS empNo, BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCNT_NO AS accntNo, DEDUCT_FAM_CNT AS deductFamCnt, SALARY_GRADE AS salaryGrade, ADJUST_RSN AS adjustRsn, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM EMP_PAY_INFO WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31' ORDER BY START_DTM DESC, PAY_SEQ DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT PAY_SEQ AS paySeq, EMP_NO AS empNo, BASE_AMT AS baseAmt, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCNT_NO AS accntNo, DEDUCT_FAM_CNT AS deductFamCnt, SALARY_GRADE AS salaryGrade, ADJUST_RSN AS adjustRsn, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM EMP_PAY_INFO WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} ORDER BY START_DTM DESC, PAY_SEQ DESC

choose.when:
UPDATE EMP_PAY_INFO SET BASE_AMT = #{baseAmt}, BANK_NAME = #{bankName}, ACCNT_NO = #{accntNo}, DEDUCT_FAM_CNT = #{deductFamCnt}, SALARY_GRADE = #{salaryGrade}, ADJUST_RSN = #{adjustRsn}, START_DTM =
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , END_DTM =
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
WHERE PAY_SEQ = #{paySeq}
choose.otherwise:
INSERT INTO EMP_PAY_INFO (PAY_SEQ, EMP_NO, BASE_AMT, BANK_NAME, ACCNT_NO, DEDUCT_FAM_CNT, SALARY_GRADE, ADJUST_RSN, START_DTM, END_DTM) VALUES ( SEQ_PAY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{empNo}, #{baseAmt}, #{bankName}, #{accntNo}, #{deductFamCnt}, #{salaryGrade}, #{adjustRsn},
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
)

mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.SALARY_ITEM_CODE AS salaryItemCode, S.SALARY_ITEM_NAME AS salaryItemName, E.ITEM_AMOUNT AS itemAmount, TO_CHAR(E.START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(E.END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM EMP_SALARY_ITEM E LEFT JOIN SALARY_ITEM S ON S.SALARY_ITEM_CODE = E.SALARY_ITEM_CODE WHERE E.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(E.START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(E.END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY E.SALARY_ITEM_CODE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EMP_SALARY_ITEM (EMP_NO, SALARY_ITEM_CODE, ITEM_AMOUNT, START_DTM, END_DTM) VALUES ( #{empNo}, #{salaryItemCode}, #{itemAmount},
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, POS_CD AS posCd, STD_AMT AS stdAmt, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT WHERE POS_CD = #{posCd} AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DT, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY START_DT DESC, BASE_AMT_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, POS_CD AS posCd, STD_AMT AS stdAmt, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT WHERE POS_CD = #{posCd} AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31' ORDER BY START_DT DESC, BASE_AMT_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, POS_CD AS posCd, STD_AMT AS stdAmt, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT WHERE POS_CD = #{posCd} ORDER BY START_DT DESC, BASE_AMT_NO DESC

SELECT baseAmtNo, posCd, stdAmt, startDtm, endDtm FROM ( SELECT BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, POS_CD AS posCd, STD_AMT AS stdAmt, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY POS_CD ORDER BY START_DT DESC NULLS LAST, BASE_AMT_NO DESC ) rn FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY posCd

SELECT baseAmtNo, posCd, stdAmt, startDtm, endDtm FROM ( SELECT BASE_AMT_NO AS baseAmtNo, POS_CD AS posCd, STD_AMT AS stdAmt, TO_CHAR(START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY POS_CD ORDER BY START_DT DESC NULLS LAST, BASE_AMT_NO DESC ) rn FROM GRADE_BASE_AMT ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY posCd

choose.when:
UPDATE GRADE_BASE_AMT SET POS_CD = #{posCd}, STD_AMT = #{stdAmt}, START_DT =
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , END_DTM =
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
WHERE BASE_AMT_NO = #{baseAmtNo}
choose.otherwise:
INSERT INTO GRADE_BASE_AMT (BASE_AMT_NO, POS_CD, STD_AMT, START_DT, END_DTM) VALUES ( SEQ_BASE_AMT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{posCd}, #{stdAmt},
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
)

mapper.select: SELECT STEP_RATE_NO AS stepRateNo, SALARY_STEP AS salaryStep, INCREASE_RATE AS increaseRate, TO_CHAR(CREATED_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdDtm, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm, USE_YN AS useYn FROM STEP_RATE WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY SALARY_STEP

SELECT STEP_RATE_NO AS stepRateNo, SALARY_STEP AS salaryStep, INCREASE_RATE AS increaseRate, TO_CHAR(CREATED_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdDtm, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm, USE_YN AS useYn FROM STEP_RATE WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY SALARY_STEP
SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(START_DTM), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM STEP_RATE WHERE TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31'
mapper.update: UPDATE STEP_RATE SET END_DTM = TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), USE_YN = 'N' WHERE TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM STEP_RATE WHERE TRUNC(START_DTM) = TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO STEP_RATE (STEP_RATE_NO, SALARY_STEP, INCREASE_RATE, CREATED_DTM, START_DTM, END_DTM, USE_YN) VALUES ( SEQ_STEP_RATE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{salaryStep}, #{increaseRate}, SYSDATE,
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT SALARY_ITEM_CODE AS salaryItemCode, SALARY_ITEM_NAME AS salaryItemName, ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, TAX_TYPE AS taxType FROM SALARY_ITEM ORDER BY SALARY_ITEM_CODE
SELECT LPAD(TO_CHAR(SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL), 10, '0') FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD(TO_CHAR(SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL), 10, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SALARY_ITEM ( SALARY_ITEM_CODE, SALARY_ITEM_NAME, ITEM_TYPE, TAX_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{salaryItemCode}, #{salaryItemName}, #{itemType}, #{taxType} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO SALARY_ITEM T USING ( SELECT #{salaryItemCode} AS SALARY_ITEM_CODE, #{salaryItemName} AS SALARY_ITEM_NAME, #{itemType} AS ITEM_TYPE, #{taxType} AS TAX_TYPE FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.SALARY_ITEM_CODE = S.SALARY_ITEM_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.SALARY_ITEM_NAME = S.SALARY_ITEM_NAME, T.ITEM_TYPE = S.ITEM_TYPE, T.TAX_TYPE = S.TAX_TYPE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SALARY_ITEM_CODE, SALARY_ITEM_NAME, ITEM_TYPE, TAX_TYPE) VALUES (S.SALARY_ITEM_CODE, S.SALARY_ITEM_NAME, S.ITEM_TYPE, S.TAX_TYPE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RATE_NO AS rateNo, PENSION_RATE AS pensionRate, HEALTH_RATE AS healthRate, EMPLOY_RATE AS employRate, CARE_RATE AS careRate, INCOME_TAX_RATE AS incomeTaxRate, LOCAL_TAX_RATE AS localTaxRate, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM INSURANCE_RATE WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01')) AND TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) ORDER BY START_DTM DESC, RATE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RATE_NO AS rateNo, PENSION_RATE AS pensionRate, HEALTH_RATE AS healthRate, EMPLOY_RATE AS employRate, CARE_RATE AS careRate, INCOME_TAX_RATE AS incomeTaxRate, LOCAL_TAX_RATE AS localTaxRate, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM INSURANCE_RATE WHERE TRUNC(NVL(END_DTM, DATE '9999-12-31')) = DATE '9999-12-31' ORDER BY START_DTM DESC, RATE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RATE_NO AS rateNo, PENSION_RATE AS pensionRate, HEALTH_RATE AS healthRate, EMPLOY_RATE AS employRate, CARE_RATE AS careRate, INCOME_TAX_RATE AS incomeTaxRate, LOCAL_TAX_RATE AS localTaxRate, TO_CHAR(START_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDtm, TO_CHAR(END_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS endDtm FROM INSURANCE_RATE ORDER BY NVL(START_DTM, DATE '1900-01-01') DESC, RATE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

choose.when:
UPDATE INSURANCE_RATE SET PENSION_RATE = #{pensionRate}, HEALTH_RATE = #{healthRate}, EMPLOY_RATE = #{employRate}, CARE_RATE = #{careRate}, INCOME_TAX_RATE = #{incomeTaxRate}, LOCAL_TAX_RATE = #{localTaxRate}, START_DTM =
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL , END_DTM =
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
WHERE RATE_NO = #{rateNo}
choose.otherwise:
INSERT INTO INSURANCE_RATE (RATE_NO, PENSION_RATE, HEALTH_RATE, EMPLOY_RATE, CARE_RATE, INCOME_TAX_RATE, LOCAL_TAX_RATE, START_DTM, END_DTM) VALUES ( SEQ_RATE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{pensionRate}, #{healthRate}, #{employRate}, #{careRate}, #{incomeTaxRate}, #{localTaxRate},
TO_DATE(#{startDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{endDtm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
)

mapper.select: SELECT PR.PAYROLL_NO AS payrollNo, TO_CHAR(PR.CREATED_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdDtm, PR.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, P.POS_NM AS posNm, PR.CONFIRM_YN AS confirmYn FROM PAYROLL PR JOIN EMP E ON E.EMP_NO = PR.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON P.POS_CD = E.POS_CD WHERE PR.PAY_YYYYMM BETWEEN #{fromYm} AND #{toYm} ORDER BY PR.CREATED_DTM DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PAYROLL_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PAYROLL (PAYROLL_NO, EMP_NO, PAY_YYYYMM, TOTAL_PAY_AMT, TOTAL_DEDUCT_AMT, NET_PAY_AMT, CONFIRM_YN, CREATED_DTM) VALUES (#{payrollNo}, #{empNo}, #{payYyyymm}, #{totalPayAmt}, #{totalDeductAmt}, #{netPayAmt}, 'N', SYSDATE)

INSERT INTO PAYROLL_ITEM (ITEM_DETAIL_NO, PAYROLL_NO, ITEM_CODE, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_TYPE_CD, AMOUNT, TAXABLE_YN) VALUES (SEQ_ITEM_DETAIL_NO.NEXTVAL, #{payrollNo}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{amount}, #{taxableYn})
mapper.select: SELECT PR.PAYROLL_NO AS payrollNo, PR.EMP_NO AS empNo, PR.PAY_YYYYMM AS payYyyymm, PR.TOTAL_PAY_AMT AS totalPayAmt, PR.TOTAL_DEDUCT_AMT AS totalDeductAmt, PR.NET_PAY_AMT AS netPayAmt, PR.CONFIRM_YN AS confirmYn, TO_CHAR(PR.CREATED_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdDtm FROM PAYROLL PR WHERE PR.PAYROLL_NO = #{payrollNo}

SELECT ITEM_DETAIL_NO AS itemDetailNo, PAYROLL_NO AS payrollNo, ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM_TYPE_CD AS itemTypeCd, AMOUNT AS amount, TAXABLE_YN AS taxableYn FROM PAYROLL_ITEM WHERE PAYROLL_NO = #{payrollNo} ORDER BY ITEM_TYPE_CD, ITEM_CODE
